title: Podman api v2 stable sdk
body: Is docker python sdk + podman-py sdk fully compatible for podman build , podman unshare, mount API for unprivileged containers ?

comments.body:
It should be compatible with Docker features, but it will not include support for unique Podman features - so no pods, no `podman mount`, no `podman generate kube` or `podman generate systemd`.

However, it should work fine with privileged containers.
These types of questions should go to the mailing list.
And you can subscribe to the list [here](https://lists.podman.io/admin/lists/podman.lists.podman.io/).
